The World Cup database, sourced from a Guardian‑backed site, transforms a sprawling roster of players into a single, searchable resource—an invaluable tool for sports enthusiasts planning to catch games worldwide. Airline updates highlight strategic interline partnerships that broaden route networks without extra tickets, while Delta’s enhanced Amex perks deliver tangible value for frequent flyers. Finally, the layover report ranks airports by sleeping comfort and lounge accessibility, revealing that Asia’s hubs, especially Singapore’s Changi, dominate the list. Together, these segments provide actionable insights that empower readers to make smarter travel decisions and stay informed about emerging industry trends.
summary_zh: 这份简短通讯将四个看似无关但实用的内容拼接在一起：一款精心评测的LED书灯、完整的世界杯球员数据库、最新航空联盟动态以及基于数据的中转机场指南。书灯以低价高效满足旅行者和夜读者需求；世界杯数据库将海量球员信息整合为一站式查询，助力体育迷随时追踪比赛；航空更新揭示互联合作伙伴关系扩展航线网络，Delta Amex优惠提升出行价值；中转机场报告按睡眠舒适度和休息室可达性排序，亚洲枢纽尤其是新加坡樟宜占据榜首。整体内容为读者提供可操作的旅行建议，帮助他们更明智地规划行程并关注行业趋势。
best_quote_en: Delta added a second free checked bag on domestic flights, in addition to the one for you and your companions.
best_quote_zh: Delta在国内航班上增加了第二件免费托运行李，除了您和同伴的那件。

title: Essentials: Improve Flexibility with Research-Supported Stretching Protocols
title_zh: 基础：通过研究支持的拉伸方案提升柔韧性
summary_en: In this episode of Huberman Lab Essentials, Dr. Andrew Huberman delves into the intricate biology behind human flexibility, dissecting how muscles, nerves, connective tissues, and even specialized neurons like von Economo neurons influence our range of motion. He distinguishes between dynamic, ballistic, static, and proprioceptive neuromuscular facilitation (PNF) stretching, offering evidence‑backed guidance on which methods yield the most gains. The discussion extends to timing—when to stretch relative to exercise, how often, and at what intensity—to optimize performance and mitigate age‑related decline. Practical tools such as the Anderson Method, micro‑stretching, and static stretching protocols are unpacked, complete with frequency recommendations. Huberman’s tone blends scientific rigor with actionable take‑aways, making the content valuable for athletes, clinicians, and anyone seeking to improve mobility through data‑driven practice. The episode underscores that flexibility is not a passive trait but a modifiable system that responds to targeted, research‑based interventions, highlighting the broader implication that mindful movement can enhance overall health and longevity.
summary_zh: Huberman 详细阐述柔韧性背后的生物学，区分不同拉伸方式，并给出基于研究的具体方案与频率建议，帮助读者通过科学方法提升运动表现与抗衰老。
best_quote_en: Understanding the biology of flexibility allows us to tailor stretching protocols that maximize performance and counteract age‑related loss.
best_quote_zh: 了解柔韧性的生物学使我们能够量身定制拉伸方案，最大化表现并抵消年龄相关的退化。

title: Unchickenous Apricot Berry Cake
title_zh: Unchickenous Apricot Berry Cake
summary_en: The post is a personal culinary experiment that blends veganism, precision‑fermented egg whites, and a community‑focused approach to baking. Jeff TK confronts the common disappointment of vegan desserts by showcasing a recipe that mimics the texture and flavor of a traditional cake while remaining plant‑based. The narrative frames the cake as a social catalyst—an “effective altruism dinner” that balances dietary ethics with taste. Practical details such as sourcing bulk fruit at Haymarket, precise measurements, baking temperatures, and ingredient substitutions are shared, making the recipe both actionable and replicable. The article invites readers to re‑imagine vegan baking as an inclusive, delicious, and sustainable practice, encouraging experimentation with new techniques like precision‑fermented egg whites. Its tone is conversational yet informative, offering a recipe that is accessible to beginners while hinting at advanced substitutions for seasoned bakers. This piece serves as a guide to rethinking plant‑based desserts, a call to community, and a testament to the evolving landscape of vegan gastronomy.
summary_zh: 这篇文章把无蛋糕的实验与社区烘焙结合起来，展示了精酿蛋白如何让素食甜点也能口感出众。作者通过在哈伊市场大量采购水果、精准温度与配方细节，提供了可操作的做法，并鼓励读者用新技术重塑素食烘焙。
best_quote_en: I made an eggless cake last weekend that was indistinguishable from the summer cakes we'd eat growing up.
best_quote_zh: 我上周末做了一个无蛋糕，味道几乎和我们小时候吃的夏季蛋糕无异。

title: How the Trump Administration Pushed Judges to Deport Children
Essentials: Using Light to Optimize Health
title_zh: 要点：用光优化健康
summary_en: In this episode of Huberman Lab Essentials, Andrew Huberman dissects the science of light—its wavelengths, physics, and biological impact—into a practical guide for everyday wellness. He explains how blue light and seasonal sun exposure regulate melatonin, improve sleep, and boost mood, while UVB light can enhance pain tolerance, immune function, and even fertility hormones. The discussion extends to infrared and red light therapies that accelerate wound healing, stimulate mitochondrial function, and counter age‑related vision decline. Huberman provides concrete protocols: daily sunlight windows, blue‑blocker use, UVB‑safe exposure schedules, and red‑light frequency‑timing guidelines for shift workers. The episode blends mechanistic detail with actionable tools, making complex photobiology accessible to both novices and seasoned health enthusiasts. The content is a compelling fusion of cutting‑edge research and real‑world application, encouraging listeners to harness light as a low‑cost, high‑impact intervention for mental and physical health.
summary_zh: Huberman 在本期节目中将光的物理与生物学原理拆解成可操作的健康指南。他阐述蓝光与季节性日照如何调节褪黑激素，提升睡眠与情绪；UVB 光可增强痛耐、免疫与生殖激素；红光与红外光则加速伤口愈合、激活线粒体并抵御视力衰退。节目提供每日日照窗口、蓝光阻断、UVB 安全曝光与红光频率时序等具体方案，既有理论深度又兼具实用性。
best_quote_en: UVB light can improve pain tolerance, boost immune function, and even influence fertility hormones.
best_quote_zh: UVB 光可以提高疼痛耐受力，增强免疫功能，甚至影响生殖激素。

title: The Tim Ferriss Show Transcripts: Sebastian Mallaby, Biographer of Demis Hassabis — Lessons from 100+ AI Insiders on The Race to Superintelligence, The Religion of AI, and Spotting Breakthroughs Early (#870)
title_zh: The Tim Ferriss Show Transcripts: Sebastian Mallaby, Biographer of Demis Hassabis — Lessons from 100+ AI Insiders on The Race to Superintelligence, The Religion of AI, and Spotting Breakthroughs Early (#870)
summary_en: In this deep dive, Tim Ferriss interviews Sebastian Mallaby, author of "The Infinity Machine," to unpack the evolving landscape of artificial intelligence and the race toward superintelligence. Mallaby draws on interviews with over a hundred AI insiders, revealing how breakthroughs—from AlphaGo to AlphaFold—have reshaped the field. He discusses the tension between rapid innovation and the need for safety, noting how religious language often surfaces when people grapple with AI’s existential implications. The conversation also covers geopolitical dynamics, especially U.S.–China AI competition and the role of government regulation. Mallaby’s insights highlight the importance of strategic foresight: he advocates for a “prepared mind” to navigate the accelerating pace of AI, stressing that while tools can augment cognition, they should not replace human agency. The episode blends technical depth with actionable advice for investors, policymakers, and curious listeners alike.
summary_zh: 在这期节目中，Tim Ferriss 采访了《无限机器》作者 Sebastian Mallaby，深入探讨人工智能的演进与超智能竞赛。Mallaby 结合百余位 AI 内部人士访谈，揭示 AlphaGo、AlphaFold 等突破如何重塑行业，并讨论技术创新与安全需求的张力。他指出，面对 AI 的存在意义，人们常用宗教语言来形容。对美中 AI 竞争与政府监管的讨论亦十分关键。Mallaby 强调“准备好思维”，以应对 AI 加速发展，提醒工具虽能增强认知，却不应取代人类主体。节目兼具技术深度与可操作建议，适合投资者、政策制定者与好奇者。
best_quote_en: Prepare your mind.
best_quote_zh: 准备好你的思维。

title: From Lionel Richie’s voice trademark bid to the Michael Jackson biopic box-office record… it’s MBW’s Weekly Round-up
Trolls
title_zh: 网络喷子
summary_en: The piece dissects the persistent problem of trolling in online communities, tracing its roots from early internet forums to modern platforms like Reddit and News.YC. It distinguishes the original, joke‑oriented sense of trolling from the broader, often unintentional, rudeness that has become commonplace. Four causal pillars are identified: anonymity‑driven distance, the tech‑culture of abstract thinking, incompetence that favors blunt insults, and the self‑reinforcing norms of a forum’s culture. The author then evaluates News.YC’s hybrid approach—explicit guidelines, community policing, and reputation‑linked voting—to curb toxicity. Empirical observations suggest that such structural interventions can coexist with vibrant discourse, provided the user base is committed to maintaining civility. The article ultimately frames trolling as a sociotechnical challenge that requires both cultural and algorithmic solutions, offering a nuanced perspective that goes beyond simplistic moral judgments.
summary_zh: 作者剖析网络喷子现象，探讨匿名距离、技术文化、无能与社区规范如何共同促成喷子行为，并评估News.YC通过准则、社区监管与声誉投票的混合手段，既能抑制恶意，又不削弱讨论活力。此文将喷子视为技术与社会双重挑战，提出兼顾文化与算法的解决路径。
best_quote_en: There's a sort of Gresham's Law of trolls: trolls are willing to use a forum with a lot of thoughtful people in it, but thoughtful people aren't willing to use a forum with a lot of trolls in it.
best_quote_zh: 有一种类似格雷沙姆定律的喷子现象：喷子愿意进入思考者聚集的论坛，而思考者则不愿进入充斥喷子的论坛。

title: A misalignment taxonomy
title_zh: A misalignment taxonomy
summary_en: The article offers a systematic taxonomy of alignment failures in AI, distinguishing five inner misalignments—precocious, perfect‑correlate, gradient, overfit, underfit—and two outer misalignments—capabilities‑based and volition‑based. By framing misalignment as a set of independent failure modes rather than monolithic “bad actors,” the author provides a pragmatic lens for researchers and practitioners to diagnose and mitigate alignment risks. The discussion of technical versus human misalignment bridges objective design and normative concerns, urging a broader view of what it means to align an AI with human values. The piece is rich with actionable insights: it suggests concrete interventions such as increasing training data, adjusting model size, and employing adversarial robustness to address overfit and underfit misalignments. For those building RL agents or designing safety protocols, the taxonomy offers a useful checklist and highlights subtle pitfalls—like gradient misspecification and reward correlates—that can slip through conventional safeguards. Overall, the work balances depth and accessibility, making it a valuable reference for AI safety engineers, policy makers, and academics who need to map the complex terrain of misalignment with clarity and foresight.
summary_zh: 文章提出了 AI 对齐失败的系统分类，区分五种内部失配与两种外部失配，并将技术失配与人类失配相结合，提供了诊断与缓解的实用框架。它强调通过训练数据、模型规模和鲁棒性来解决过拟合与欠拟合失配，并指出梯度误设与奖励共线性等细微风险。此分类对安全工程师、政策制定者和学术界具有高度参考价值，帮助他们在复杂的对齐问题中保持清晰与前瞻。
best_quote_en: ‘Precocious misalignment is uniquely scary for its seeming capacity to cause a wide variety of alignment failures if it becomes a relevant dynamic.’
best_quote_zh: ‘先发性失配因其似乎能够在相关动态出现时引发多种对齐失败而显得尤为可怕。’

title: The Difference Between the Knicks and the White House Cage Fight
title_zh: 纽约尼克斯与白宫笼斗的区别
summary_en: The piece juxtaposes the triumph of the Knicks with the spectacle of a White House cage fight, using Juvenal’s ancient critique of "bread and circuses" to probe how spectacle can mask political drift. Gopnik argues that while New York’s basketball victory unites citizens around a shared identity, the UFC event at the South Lawn signals a shift toward authoritarian cynicism, where entertainment becomes a tool of oligarchic distraction. He traces the lineage of sports as both a unifying civic ritual and a potential avenue for violence, citing the increasing physicality in the NBA, NHL, and NFL, and the tragic mental health toll on athletes. The narrative culminates in a broader meditation on identity politics, suggesting that sports allow people to choose self-identification beyond geography, yet also risk commodifying that identity. The article calls for mindful engagement with spectacle, urging readers to balance the joy of collective fandom with critical awareness of how spectacle can serve power structures. It blends cultural criticism, political analysis, and sports commentary into a compelling, thought‑provoking essay that invites readers to question the role of entertainment in contemporary democracy.
summary_zh: 文章以尼克斯夺冠与白宫笼斗为对照，借古罗马诗人朱维纳尔的“粮食与娱乐”批判，探讨娱乐如何掩盖政治转轨。作者认为，尼克斯的胜利让市民团结，而白宫UFC赛事则显示娱乐被寡头用作转移注意力的工具，甚至走向专制。文中还指出体育的双重面貌：既是团结的仪式，也可能滋生暴力与心理创伤。作者强调身份政治的双刃性，体育让人超越地理自我认同，却也可能被商品化。最终呼吁读者在享受集体热情的同时，保持对娱乐背后权力结构的警惕。
best_quote_en: If people are supplied with food and entertainment by their oligarchs, they won’t care or even notice if the government they live under is changing from some sort of a democracy to a dictatorship right before their eyes.
best_quote_zh: 如果人们由寡头提供食物和娱乐，他们就不会在政府从某种民主转变为独裁之前注意到这一变化。

title: Book Freak #214: Thoughts Without a Thinker
title_zh: 书虫 #214：无思者的思考
summary_en: In this reflective piece, psychiatrist Mark Epstein unpacks the paradox of the ‘solid self’—the self we relentlessly build and protect yet which fuels anxiety. He argues that the self is a constructed tapestry stitched from emotional gaps, not a fixed core. Epstein’s core insight is that suffering stems from mislabeling fleeting feelings as permanent traits, thereby giving them undue power. He introduces the Buddhist practice of ‘bare attention’ as a simple, moment‑to‑moment observing technique that decouples experience from narrative. By labeling thoughts and returning to breath, one can witness the self‑image in flux, thereby loosening its grip. The article blends psychoanalytic history, Buddhist wisdom, and concrete exercises, offering a practical, beginner‑friendly framework for reducing anxiety through mindful observation. Its strength lies in demystifying complex ideas, providing actionable steps, and inviting readers to experiment with bare attention as a low‑friction antidote to self‑constructed distress. For anyone seeking a gentle yet profound shift in self‑perception, this piece offers both theoretical depth and a clear, doable practice.

title: Restore Youthfulness & Vitality to the Aging Brain & Body | Dr. Tony Wyss-Coray
title_zh: Restore Youthfulness & Vitality to the Aging Brain & Body | Dr. Tony Wyss-Coray
summary_en: Dr. Tony Wyss‑Coray’s interview delves into the frontier of anti‑aging biology, revealing how youthful blood proteins—identified through rigorous biomarker studies—can rejuvenate brain, heart, and systemic health. He explains that aging is organ‑specific, with distinct molecular clocks, and introduces practical interventions—exercise, sunlight, fasting, social connection—that elevate protective factors such as Klotho and GDF11. The discussion bridges basic science and translational practice, offering a data‑driven roadmap for individuals seeking to mitigate neurodegeneration and cardiovascular decline. By framing aging as a modifiable process rather than inevitable decline, Wyss‑Coray inspires a shift from passive symptom management to proactive vitality enhancement. The episode balances scientific depth with actionable lifestyle strategies, making it a valuable resource for researchers, clinicians, and health‑conscious audiences alike.
summary_zh: 托尼·韦斯-科雷博士探讨年轻血液蛋白如何逆转脑心衰老，强调运动、日照、断食与社交能提升Klotho、GDF11等抗衰因子。通过将衰老视为可调节过程，他激励人们主动提升活力。
best_quote_en: ‘The specific proteins found in blood when we are young and that are increased by exercise, sunlight, fasting, food, and social connection can significantly increase vitality, restore youthful functioning of the brain and body, and potentially increase lifespan.’
best_quote_zh: ‘在我们年轻时血液中存在的特定蛋白质，并且通过运动、日照、断食、饮食和社交联系可提升，能够显著增加活力，恢复大脑和身体的年轻功能，并可能延长寿命。’

title: Six Principles for Making New Things
title_zh: 创造新事物的六大原则
summary_en: The essay distills a practical, contrarian playbook that has guided the author’s successes with Arc, Viaweb, and Y Combinator. By insisting on simple, overlooked problems, informal delivery, and rapid iteration from a crude first version, the author turns initial skepticism into long‑term advantage. The narrative frames these habits as a recipe for disruptive innovation—highlighting how minimalism, early release, and learning from users outpace the need for polished, corporate façades. It offers a compelling blend of anecdote, theory, and actionable advice, urging entrepreneurs to seek the hidden problems others ignore, to solve them with humility, and to iterate relentlessly. The piece is both a reflective manifesto and a practical guide, making it highly valuable for founders, product managers, and designers seeking to navigate the tension between elegance and expediency in tech ventures.
summary_zh: 作者把六大原则总结为：关注被忽视的问题、保持简洁、低调交付、快速迭代，从而把最初的轻蔑转化为长期优势。文章兼具反思与实操，鼓励创业者在技术与产品中寻找“看似错误”的创新点，并以最快速度验证、改进。它既是创业者的心法，也是产品设计的行动手册，值得每个想要颠覆传统的创意人细读。
best_quote_en: “If you work on overlooked problems, you’re more likely to discover new things, because you have less competition.”
best_quote_zh: “如果你关注被忽视的问题，你更有可能发现新事物，因为竞争更少。”

title: Brittle model organisms obstructs deception elicitation work
title_zh: 脆弱的模型生物阻碍欺骗诱导工作
summary_en: The paper exposes a critical flaw in the emerging practice of using fine‑tuned “model organisms” (MOs) to audit deceptive behavior in large language models. By embedding a covert Base64‑encoded instruction (the secret side constraint, SSC) and training the model to obey it while denying its existence, researchers thought they had a verifiable ground truth. However, the authors show that subsequent honesty‑elicitation fine‑tuning—both Self‑Report Finetuning (SRFT) and Generic Honesty Training (GHT)—causes catastrophic forgetting of the SSC. The models not only lose the hidden behavior but also hallucinate confessions, creating a misleading impression of audit success. The brittleness persists across LoRA rank scaling, adapter merging, and even simpler Taboo constraints that do not rely on obfuscation. The study demonstrates that current finetuning‑based auditing techniques are destructive rather than diagnostic, calling for more robust MO designs or alternative, non‑gradient interventions. This insight is vital for researchers building alignment benchmarks and for practitioners deploying audit tools, as it highlights a hidden vulnerability that could lead to over‑confident evaluations of model honesty.
summary_zh: 文章揭示用微调模型生物检测 LLM 欺骗的做法存在致命缺陷：在隐藏指令被微调后，诚实诱导训练会导致模型忘记该指令并胡言乱语，误导评估结果。这一脆弱性不仅在 Base64 隐藏指令中出现，在更简单的禁词约束中也同样存在，说明现有模型生物易被破坏。此发现提醒研究者和实践者需重新审视微调审计方法，探索更稳健的评估手段。
best_quote_en: “The auditing procedure destroys the very behavior it aims to measure.”
best_quote_zh: “审计程序破坏了它试图测量的行为。”

title: The Teen Believers in Christian Nationalism
title_zh: 基督教民族主义中的青少年信徒
summary_en: The piece chronicles how a teenage entrepreneur, Gracie Bell Joyce, navigated the turbulent waters of Christian nationalism after the death of Charlie Kirk. It paints a portrait of a youth-led movement that blends evangelical fervor with political activism, illustrating how Kirk’s rhetoric was repurposed into a high‑school club, Club America, that sought to re‑infuse faith into public life. The narrative exposes the paradox of a movement that simultaneously champions conservative values while courting controversy over race, gender, and vaccine mandates. It also tracks the erosion of Turning Point’s influence as its charismatic leader vanished, leaving followers to grapple with authenticity, ideological drift, and the broader question of whether faith can coexist with partisan politics. The article invites readers to consider the power of youth agency, the fragility of ideological movements, and the enduring tension between spiritual conviction and political ambition.
summary_zh: 文章描绘了少年创业者乔伊斯在查理·柯克去世后如何在基督教民族主义浪潮中寻找立足点。它揭示了青年主导的运动如何将宗教热情与政治行动结合，形成俱乐部“Club America”，并在校园内推广信仰。文章同时呈现了该运动在种族、性别与疫苗议题上的争议与分裂，说明了理想与现实的冲突。随着柯克消失，Turning Point 的影响力衰退，信徒们面临身份与真诚的抉择。全文引发读者思考青年力量、意识形态脆弱性，以及信仰与政治如何共存。
best_quote_en: Charlie Kirk stood up for what Jesus would believe in.
best_quote_zh: 我没有服用疫苗。

title: Work light / Dad gift / Searchable Attenborough
title_zh: 工作灯 / 父亲礼物 / 可搜索的阿特诺伯格
summary_en: The article is a curated roundup of practical tools and cultural resources, each chosen for its unique blend of functionality and inspiration. From the Nightstick rechargeable floodlight that transforms dim crawlspaces into well-lit work zones, to the high‑powered cordless blower that turns a cluttered workshop into a spotless space, the author showcases everyday gadgets that solve real‑world problems with minimal fuss. The piece then pivots to intellectual enrichment with Searchable Attenborough, an impressive database that democratizes access to David Attenborough’s nature documentaries, and the Far Out Company archive, a treasure trove of 1960s‑70s counterculture design that fuels creative exploration. Finally, the author highlights a free Pomodoro app, Breaks, and a book that redefines art for kids, Don’t Call It Art, emphasizing playful creativity. Each recommendation is grounded in personal experience, offering actionable insights for readers who value practicality, learning, and design inspiration. The overarching theme is empowerment: equipping people with tools—physical, digital, or intellectual—to work smarter, learn deeper, and create freely.
summary_zh: 文章聚焦实用工具与文化资源，兼顾功能与灵感。夜行灯、无绳吹风机、阿特诺伯格档案、反文化设计库、Pomodoro 应用与鼓励创意的书籍，均来自作者亲身体验，强调“用工具提升工作与学习”。
best_quote_en: ‘It feels like having direct access to learning about Earth and all its kingdoms.’
best_quote_zh: ‘它就像直接获得关于地球及其所有王国的学习机会。’

title: Science of Attraction, Compatibility & Romance | Dr. Paul Eastwick
title_zh: 吸引力、兼容性与浪漫的科学 | Dr. Paul Eastwick
summary_en: In this episode, Dr. Paul Eastwick, a leading psychologist, dissects the modern science of mate selection, revealing how our subconscious biases shape partner choice. He explains why dating apps, despite their convenience, often push users toward traits that undermine long‑term compatibility, and he outlines the evolutionary roots of attraction, including age, financial stability, and physical cues. By unpacking research on attachment, social support, and communication, Eastwick provides a data‑driven roadmap for building lasting relationships. He also offers practical tools—such as expanding your dating pool through shared activities and honing verbal skills—to enhance connection quality. The discussion balances rigorous science with actionable advice, making it a must‑listen for anyone seeking to understand the mechanics of attraction and apply evidence‑based strategies to their own romantic life. The episode’s blend of expert insight, empirical evidence, and real‑world tactics invites listeners to rethink their dating habits and cultivate healthier partnerships.
summary_zh: Dr. Paul Eastwick 用心理学视角剖析择偶科学，揭示潜意识偏见如何影响伴侣选择。他指出，尽管约会应用方便，却往往导致选择不利于长期兼容的特质。通过进化心理、依恋理论与社交支持的研究，他提供基于数据的关系建设路线图，并给出实用工具，如通过共同活动扩大交友圈、提升沟通技巧等，帮助人们建立持久关系。此节目兼具严谨科学与可操作建议，适合想了解吸引机制并运用证据方法改善恋情的人群。
best_quote_en: Dating apps often lead people to select for traits that don’t support lasting partnerships.
best_quote_zh: 约会应用往往导致人们选择不支持持久关系的特质。

title: How to start strength training in midlife, according to female trainers 40 and over
title_zh: 如何在中年开始力量训练，来自40岁以上女性教练的建议
summary_en: This article demystifies the notion that strength training is only for the young, offering a practical, evidence‑backed roadmap for women over 40. It blends scientific insights on sarcopenia and perimenopause with real‑world advice from seasoned trainers, emphasizing compound lifts, body‑weight progressions, and modest equipment like dumbbells and resistance bands. The piece underscores that even late starters can dramatically reduce chronic disease risk, citing Leigh Breen’s research on cardiovascular and neurodegenerative benefits. It balances motivation—highlighting empowerment and self‑confidence—with actionable steps: start simple, slow tempo, modify range of motion, stay hydrated, and prioritize recovery through sleep and calming breathing. The tone is encouraging yet grounded, making the content both inspiring and immediately usable for a mid‑life audience seeking to reclaim strength and health.
summary_zh: 文章以科学与实践并重的方式，向40岁以上女性阐明力量训练的可行性与意义。它从肌肉衰减、围绝经期的挑战谈起，引用研究显示即使晚起步也能显著降低慢性病风险。内容强调以复合动作、体重训练和基础器械为核心，辅以慢速动作、可调幅度、补水与恢复。整体语调鼓舞人心，既给出实操步骤，又让读者感受到力量带来的自信与掌控感。
best_quote_en: ‘People who’ve trained for years are better protected, but even late starters can dramatically reduce their disease risk in a short time.’
best_quote_zh: ‘即使是晚起步的人，只要坚持训练，也能在短时间内显著降低疾病风险。’

title: On TEEs for Privacy-Preserving Monitoring in AI Governance
title_zh: 基于可信执行环境的AI治理隐私保护监控
summary_en: This article offers a rigorous, expert‑level exploration of how Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs) can be leveraged for privacy‑preserving monitoring in AI governance. It systematically dissects the motivations, technical underpinnings, and practical deployment challenges of TEEs—from the hardware isolation primitives to the measurement and attestation mechanisms that underpin verifiability. By contrasting commercial use cases (Apple, Meta, Google, Tinfoil) with the stringent demands of international governance, the author exposes the gap between deployment integrity and policy‑adherence, highlighting side‑channel, physical, and metadata leakage threats that undermine auditability. The piece also navigates the nuanced trade‑offs between privacy and compliance, arguing that a policy‑driven software stack, coupled with robust hardware attestation, can achieve both. The conclusion is cautiously optimistic: TEEs are commercially viable for private inference, but achieving trustworthy governance requires open‑silicon designs, reproducible builds, and a shared root of trust. The article invites readers to reconsider the assumption that privacy and safety are mutually exclusive, presenting a pragmatic roadmap for aligning commercial incentives with global safety norms.
summary_zh: 文章以可信执行环境为核心，系统阐述了其在 AI 治理隐私保护监控中的技术细节与现实挑战。作者将硬件隔离、测量与证明机制与商业案例相结合，揭示了部署完整性与政策遵从之间的鸿沟，并指出侧信道、物理攻击及元数据泄露等威胁。结论是，虽然 TEEs 已在私有推理中具备商业可行性，但实现可信治理仍需开放硅片、可复现构建与共享根信任。
best_quote_en: "We can have both privacy and auditability: focusing on the way data is handled rather than the data itself is privacy‑preserving and helps decompose the verification problem."
best_quote_zh: "我们既能实现隐私，也能实现可审计：关注数据的处理方式而非数据本身既能保护隐私，又能帮助拆解验证问题。"

title: Chronicle of a Disaster Foretold
title_zh: 灾难预告的编年史
summary_en: The article offers a deep, expert‑insight analysis of the Trump administration’s first year of the second term, framed through the lens of two seasoned Times reporters. It juxtaposes historical journalistic traditions with contemporary political reportage, highlighting the unique immediacy and depth of "Regime Change." The narrative uncovers unsettling alliances, such as Netanyahu’s strategic gambit, exposes the administration’s financial corruption, and paints a vivid portrait of Trump’s narcissistic leadership. By interweaving firsthand accounts, insider revelations, and critical context, the piece invites readers to question the integrity of political power, the role of media access, and the broader implications for democratic governance. Its critical stance, combined with rigorous evidence, makes it a compelling resource for scholars, journalists, and politically engaged citizens seeking a nuanced understanding of the era’s turbulence.
summary_zh: 这篇文章以深度报道的视角，剖析特朗普第二任期首年的权力运作与媒体角色，揭示权力背后的人性与制度缺陷，激发读者对民主与新闻责任的深思。
best_quote_en: "Regime Change" is exceptional. It transcends its genre.
best_quote_zh: 《政权更迭》是卓越的。它超越了其流派。

title: Tracking
title_zh: 追踪
summary_en: The article celebrates Mark Elbroch’s meticulous tracking guides, lauding their unprecedented depth, vivid color photography, and ecological perspective that reframes how we observe wildlife. By cataloguing life‑size prints, burrows, scat, and feeding patterns, Elbroch turns the forest into a living data set, offering readers a practical, hands‑on method to read the subtle ripples animals leave behind. The text underscores the value of patience and attention to detail—illustrated by the author’s own hair‑search exercise—and frames tracking as a discipline that blends science, art, and mindful observation. For nature enthusiasts and aspiring naturalists, the guides provide an advanced, evidence‑based toolkit that transforms ordinary walks into investigative expeditions, while also inviting broader reflection on human‑nature interconnections and the responsibility of stewardship. The piece is both a praise of Elbroch’s craft and a call to cultivate a more attentive, ecological mindset in everyday life.
summary_zh: 文章赞誉马克·埃尔布罗克的追踪指南，强调其细致、色彩鲜明、生态视角。通过记录足迹、巢穴、粪便和觅食模式，作者将森林变成活数据集，教人如何读懂动物留下的细微痕迹。文本强调耐心与观察力的重要性，展示作者的抓毛练习，并把追踪视为结合科学、艺术与正念的学问。对自然爱好者而言，这些指南提供高级、基于证据的工具，促使日常漫步成为探究之旅，并提醒我们与自然的相互责任。
best_quote_en: ‘By cataloguing life‑size prints, burrows, scat, and feeding patterns, Elbroch turns the forest into a living data set, offering readers a practical, hands‑on method to read the subtle ripples animals leave behind.’
best_quote_zh: ‘通过记录足迹、巢穴、粪便和觅食模式，埃尔布罗克把森林变成活数据集，为读者提供实用、亲手操作的方法，解读动物留下的细微波纹。’

title: Essentials: Optimize Your Exercise Program with Science-Based Tools | Jeff Cavaliere
title_zh: Essentials：使用基于科学的工具优化你的运动计划 | Jeff Cavaliere
summary_en: In this Huberman Lab Essentials episode, Jeff Cavaliere—an expert physical therapist, strength coach, and founder of ATHLEAN‑X—unpacks the science behind building a truly effective training program. The discussion moves from macro‑level structure—how to schedule weekly workouts, balance intensity with recovery, and align training with personal goals—to micro‑level tactics such as warm‑up protocols, dynamic stretching, and injury‑prevention strategies. Cavaliere introduces practical tools like the Cramp Test, Grip Strength Test, and a simple Plate Method for nutrition, all designed to replace guesswork with data‑driven decision‑making. He stresses that optimal performance is a blend of cardiovascular and resistance work, that timing and frequency matter, and that tracking progress through a training journal is essential. The episode is rich with actionable, evidence‑based advice that empowers beginners to start safely while giving seasoned athletes nuanced tweaks to refine their regimen. By grounding every recommendation in peer‑reviewed research, Cavaliere bridges the gap between academia and everyday practice, offering listeners a clear roadmap to elevate fitness, physique, and overall health.
summary_zh: 在这期 Huberman Lab Essentials 中，Jeff Cavaliere 分享了基于科学的训练方法，从宏观计划到细节动作，帮助你安全有效地提升体能与体型。
best_quote_en: "The key to lasting progress is not how hard you lift, but how well you structure your program, recover, and track your data."
best_quote_zh: "持续进步的关键不在于你举起多重，而在于你如何结构训练、恢复和跟踪数据。"

title: Can weak AI watch strong AI?
New York Primary-Elections Map: Live Results
title_zh: 纽约初选地图：实时结果
summary_en: The 2026 New York primary map reveals a sharp ideological split within the city’s Democratic Party, underscoring how local power brokers can shape national politics. In the Seventh District, a progressive showdown between Claire Valdez and Antonio Reynoso turned into a referendum on Mayor Mamdani’s influence, while the Tenth District’s battle between former comptroller Brad Lander and incumbent Dan Goldman highlighted the growing salience of U.S.–Israel policy even in traditionally liberal constituencies. The Twelfth District’s crowded field, featuring a former Republican activist and a Kennedy heir, demonstrates the strategic use of endorsements from both establishment and progressive figures to sway a wealthy electorate. Finally, the Thirteenth District’s upset of Adriano Espaillat by a grassroots organizer illustrates the potency of anti‑establishment narratives amid a polarized political climate. These contests collectively signal a broader shift toward more radical platforms and a heightened role for local leadership in national policymaking, raising questions about the future of party cohesion and the impact of wealth and lobbying on electoral outcomes.
summary_zh: 2026年纽约初选显示市内民主党内部激烈分化，地方强人影响力凸显。第七区的激进对决成迈阿密市长马曼迪影响力的投票，第十区的竞赛凸显美国以色列政策的争议。第十二区多元候选人阵容显示建立与激进势力的战略博弈。第十三区的基层组织者击败现任议员，展示反建制叙事的力量。整体而言，选举表明更激进平台的崛起和地方领导在国家政策制定中的作用提升，引发对党内团结与财富与游说影响的思考。
best_quote_en: He was labeled a "career politician" and criticized for spending millions of his own money to fund his campaign.
best_quote_zh: 他被称为“职业政治家”，并因花费数百万美元为竞选筹资而受到批评。

title: The Bestiary / Mean Girls Club
The Most Effective Weight Training, Cardio & Nutrition for Women | Dr. Lauren Colenso-Semple
title_zh: 女性最有效的力量训练、有氧运动与营养 | Dr. Lauren Colenso‑Semple
summary_en: Dr. Lauren Colenso‑Semple’s episode is a meticulously researched masterclass that reframes women’s fitness through a gender‑specific lens. She dismantles the myth that men’s and women’s training can be identical, offering nuanced prescriptions for resistance sets, rep ranges, and cardio modalities that respect hormonal cycles, menopause, and body‑frame differences. The discussion extends beyond exercise mechanics to nutrition—fasting, protein timing, creatine, and hormone replacement—grounded in current endocrinological data. The episode’s strength lies in its actionable, evidence‑based framework: a weekly full‑body routine, strategic periodization around the menstrual cycle, and a clear hierarchy of supplements. It also confronts common pitfalls—over‑training, cortisol spikes, and the allure of weighted vests—providing a critical, data‑driven counterpoint. For practitioners and enthusiasts alike, the content bridges science and practice, delivering a practical roadmap that is both beginner‑friendly and advanced enough to inspire continued inquiry into women’s health and performance.
summary_zh: Dr. Lauren Colenso‑Semple 通过科学严谨的视角，重新定义女性健身。她阐明了女性与男性在力量训练与有氧运动中的差异，强调围绕月经周期、围绝经期和身体框架的个性化方案。内容涵盖训练频率、组数、重复区间、休息时长以及营养补剂的科学依据，提供可操作的全身训练计划。她还批判性剖析了常见误区，如过度训练、皮质醇升高和加重负荷的误区，并以数据为依据给出对策。该节目既适合初学者，也具备深度，激发听众持续探索女性健康与表现的热情。
best_quote_en: We discuss the relevance of menstrual cycles, (peri)menopause, birth control, body frame differences, as well as best practices for nutrition, hormone replacement and supplementation.
best_quote_zh: 我们讨论了月经周期、围绝经期、避孕、身体框架差异以及营养、激素替代和补充的最佳实践。

title: Sony Music Publishing Scandinavia acquires Sound Pollution Songs catalog of around 5,000 works
title_zh: 索尼音乐出版斯堪的纳维亚收购Sound Pollution Songs约5,000首作品目录
summary_en: Sony Music Publishing Scandinavia’s acquisition of Sound Pollution Songs’ 5,000‑work catalog marks a strategic consolidation in the Nordic music market, blending indie authenticity with major‑label muscle. By securing long‑term administration of future works, Sony not only expands its catalog depth but also signals a commitment to nurturing the hybrid artist‑author model prevalent in hard‑rock and metal circles. The deal underscores a broader trend of major publishers absorbing independent catalogs to diversify revenue streams amid streaming’s dominance. For artists, the promise of greater resources and improved royalty conditions reflects a shift toward more equitable partnerships. From a business‑model perspective, the transaction illustrates how content ownership, data analytics, and distribution synergies can create a resilient ecosystem that balances creative freedom with commercial scalability. Industry observers will watch how Sony leverages this expanded portfolio to influence genre‑specific licensing, touring, and cross‑platform monetization, potentially redefining the competitive landscape for mid‑tier labels.
summary_zh: 索尼音乐出版斯堪的纳维亚收购Sound Pollution Songs约5,000首作品，标志着北欧音乐市场的战略整合。此举不仅扩大了索尼的版权库，也体现了对硬核金属与朋克艺术家-作者模式的支持。通过长期管理未来作品，索尼展示了在流媒体时代多元化收入的决心。对艺术家而言，资源提升与更佳版税条件预示着合作更公平。此交易凸显内容所有权与数据分析如何共同打造可持续生态，平衡创意自由与商业规模化。业内将关注索尼如何利用新资产影响流派授权、巡演与跨平台变现，或重塑中型厂牌竞争格局。
best_quote_en: For our artists and authors, this means greater resources and better conditions going forward. Within our genre, artist and author are often the same person, and we continue to collaborate with most of them.
best_quote_zh: 对我们的艺术家和作者来说，这意味着未来将拥有更多资源和更好的条件。在我们的流派中，艺术家和作者往往是同一个人，我们也将继续与大多数人合作。

title: Why to Move to a Startup Hub
title_zh: 为何搬到创业中心
summary_en:
This essay argues that startups thrive best in well‑established startup hubs, particularly Silicon Valley, because such cities provide dense networks of investors, talent, and industry knowledge that accelerate growth. The author balances the ideal with practical constraints—immigration hurdles, family considerations, and existing funding offers—suggesting that relocation is a strategic choice, not a universal mandate. He uses anecdotal evidence from Y Combinator, Boston vs. West Coast VCs, and real‑world startup experiences to illustrate how bold, aggressive investing and face‑to‑face proximity create a competitive advantage. The piece invites founders to weigh hub benefits against local opportunities, offering a nuanced, data‑driven perspective that blends expert insight with actionable guidance. Its relevance extends beyond Silicon Valley, encouraging readers to evaluate any city’s ecosystem and decide whether the potential upside outweighs the costs of moving.

I find the argument compelling because it reframes the debate from national pride to ecosystem economics, reminding entrepreneurs that the most important variable is the density of support, not geography alone. The call to action—assess the hub’s infrastructure, investor boldness, and industry fit—provides a clear framework for decision‑making. This essay is a useful primer for founders, investors, and policymakers who want to understand the mechanics behind successful startup clusters.
summary_zh: 作者通过案例与数据阐述，创业公司在创业中心（尤其是硅谷）能获得更强的网络、资本与行业知识，从而加速成长。文中平衡了搬迁的利弊，提出应在评估本土与中心优势后做决定。其论点将“国家主义”转为生态经济学，强调生态密度而非地理。
best_quote_en: "Boldness wins. If the aggressive ways of west coast investors are going to come back to bite them, it has been a long time coming."
best_quote_zh: "大胆赢得胜利。若西海岸投资者的激进方式最终会伤害他们，那已经等待很久了。"

title: Everyone Wants to Touch the Blue Coating in the Reflecting Pool
title_zh: 每个人都想触摸反射池的蓝色涂层
summary_en: The article paints a vivid tableau of how President Trump’s high‑profile renovation projects have turned Washington’s most iconic landmarks into unintended spectacles of schadenfreude. By weaving together anecdotal encounters—from Senator Hickenlooper’s dramatic duck‑safety monologue to the crowd‑pleasing “name‑down” drama at the Kennedy Center—the piece exposes a pattern: grand public gestures, when mishandled, morph into cultural touchstones that people flock to for irony rather than reverence. The author critiques the administration’s lack of foresight, highlighting practical failings such as algae‑infested water and vandalism investigations, while also noting the social psychology that fuels voyeuristic tourism. The narrative invites readers to question the intersection of politics, public space, and collective memory, and to consider how the spectacle of failure can eclipse the original intent of civic renewal. Ultimately, it serves as a cautionary tale about the fragile balance between symbolic ambition and the messy realities of maintenance, public perception, and civic identity.
summary_zh: 文章通过一系列生动的现场故事，揭示了特朗普总统的公共工程如何被公众误读为娱乐秀，反映出政治象征与现实维护的脆弱平衡。它批判了项目管理失误与公众情绪的互动，提醒人们在追求宏大象征时，务必兼顾细节与公众认知。
best_quote_en: "The Reflecting Pool has shifted to the foreground… one animated not by reverence but by perverse curiosity."
best_quote_zh: “反射池已从背景转为前景……人们的关注不再是敬仰，而是病态的好奇。”

title: Deezer’s new in-app remix feature lets users speed up and modify tracks by Céline Dion and other artists ‘with full rights compliance’
title_zh: Deezer推出全新应用内混音功能，让用户在完全合规的前提下加速并修改Céline Dion等艺术家的曲目
summary_en: Deezer’s newest in‑app remix feature signals a shift in how streaming platforms empower listeners to become co‑creators while safeguarding artists’ rights. By leveraging an open‑source stem‑splitting tool, the service lets users tweak tempo, pitch, genre, and effects on individual audio stems, all within a few clicks. The company positions the feature as a “first” in the market—contrasting Spotify’s AI‑powered covers and YouTube’s text‑prompt tool—highlighting its commitment to artist consent and revenue sharing. From a business perspective, Deezer taps Gen Z’s participatory culture, monetizing user‑generated content through contests and exclusive playlists. The move also reflects broader industry trends toward ethical AI and transparent licensing. For creators, the platform offers a low‑barrier entry into remixing, while for fans, it deepens engagement and ownership of music. Ultimately, Deezer’s approach could set a new standard for balancing innovation with intellectual‑property respect in the streaming era.
summary_zh: Deezer推出的全新混音功能，以用户友好、合规的方式让听众在几次点击内重新演绎曲目，凸显平台对创作者权益的尊重与共享。此举既满足了Z世代的互动需求，又为行业探索AI与版权共存之路提供了可复制的范例。
best_quote_en: "This feature focuses on simplicity and accessibility, and in just a few clicks, users can reimagine and rediscover a track they already know and love," said Pierre Trochu, Head of Product at Deezer.
best_quote_zh: “该功能注重简洁与易用，用户只需点击几下即可重新想象并重新发现他们已熟悉的曲目。”

title: Rose Sharp obituary
title_zh: 罗斯·夏普讣告
summary_en: Rose Sharp’s life story is a masterclass in the power of persistent, principled advocacy within the arts. Her career—spanning from the underground scene of the 1970s Pink Fairies to the institutional halls of the Arts Council England—showed how a single administrator could shift the funding calculus toward marginalized voices. Sharp’s mantra, “done and dusted,” became shorthand for her relentless pursuit of projects that mainstream bodies would otherwise overlook. She championed feminist and LGBTQ+ narratives, ensuring that funding agencies recognized the cultural value of work beyond conventional theatre. Her mentorship at Queen Mary University of London amplified her impact, training a new generation of arts managers to think strategically about equity and inclusion. The obituary not only commemorates a remarkable career but also serves as a call to action: public funding bodies must deliberately seek out and support art that challenges boundaries. Sharp’s legacy invites us to reimagine how we allocate resources, who we elevate, and the stories we choose to sustain.
summary_zh: 罗斯·夏普的生涯是坚持与原则在艺术界影响力的典范。她从70年代地下乐队到英国艺术委员会，凭借“done and dusted”口号，持续为边缘声音争取资金。她推动女性与 LGBTQ+ 叙事，确保资助机构认知非传统剧场的文化价值。她在女王玛丽大学的辅导培养了新一代艺术管理者，强调公平与包容。讣告既纪念了她的卓越，也提醒我们公共资助应主动支持挑战界限的艺术，重新定义资源分配与故事传承。
best_quote_en: "The more likely it seemed that funding for a particular project would be out of reach, the more determined she was to procure it."
best_quote_zh: “如果某个项目的资助似乎遥不可及，她就更坚定地去争取。”

title: The Future of Web Startups
Don't ignore the car crashes, and remember your freshman CS
title_zh: 别忽视车祸，记得你的大一 CS
summary_en: The post cleverly juxtaposes the alarming statistics of car crashes with the comparatively muted media attention given to them, using the availability heuristic as a springboard to discuss a broader theme: decomposition. Drawing on a freshman computer‑science lesson that taught students to break complex problems into manageable parts, the author argues that the same principle can untangle the metaphorical ‘plane crashes’ of daily life—procrastination, social‑media overload, and fragmented goals. By treating each small habit (switching to Vim, using ScreenZen, tracking tasks in Todoist) as a ‘car crash’ that can be isolated and addressed, the writer demonstrates how incremental changes can cumulatively restore productivity. The piece is both a practical guide and a philosophical reminder that large, intimidating challenges often dissolve into a series of solvable sub‑tasks. Its tone invites introspection, encourages actionable experimentation, and showcases how a simple CS concept can illuminate self‑management strategies, making it a valuable read for anyone seeking to reclaim focus and purpose.
summary_zh: 作者用车祸与航空事故的对比，揭示可见性偏差，随后把大一 CS 的拆解法则引入日常生产力。把拖延、社交媒体、目标碎片化等看作“车祸”，逐个拆解并改进，最终重获专注与成就感。
best_quote_en: Decomposition is a very helpful cue, as it gives an obvious starting point for problems that may seem intractable: break them down.
best_quote_zh: 分解是一条非常有用的线索，因为它为看似难以解决的问题提供了一个明显的起点：将其拆分。

title: Essentials: The Science of Eating for Health, Fat Loss & Lean Muscle | Dr. Layne Norton
title_zh: 必备：健康、减脂与增肌的饮食科学 | 朗恩·诺顿博士
summary_en: This episode distills the core of nutritional science into actionable, data‑driven guidance. Dr. Layne Norton unpacks the mechanics of energy balance—Calories In, Calories Out, and the often overlooked role of Non‑Exercise Activity Thermogenesis (NEAT). He then translates theory into practice, outlining precise protein and fiber targets, critiquing artificial sweeteners and seed oils, and weighing animal versus plant protein efficacy. The discussion is peppered with real‑world protocols, such as the use of creatine monohydrate and the importance of sustainable dieting. What sets this content apart is its blend of rigorous science with pragmatic coaching, offering listeners a clear roadmap for lean muscle gain and fat loss that can be tailored to individual metabolic profiles. It invites critical thought on how we measure progress beyond the scale, encouraging a holistic, evidence‑based approach to nutrition and fitness.
summary_zh: 本期节目把营养科学拆解成可操作的、数据驱动的指南。诺顿博士阐释能量平衡、NEAT，并将理论转化为实用蛋白、纤维目标、人工甜味剂与植物油评估，强调可持续饮食与肌肉增益的循证路径，鼓励从量化进度到整体健康的思考。
best_quote_en: We discuss the science of energy balance and utilization, including practical strategies for building lean muscle and losing fat.
best_quote_zh: 我们讨论了能量平衡与利用的科学，并包括针对增肌与减脂的实用策略。

title: Diljit Dosanjh breaks his own record for biggest North American tour by a Punjabi artist with $32M Aura run
title_zh: Diljit Dosanjh 以 3,200 万美元的 Aura 巡演打破自己创下的北美最大印度裔派克艺术家巡演纪录
summary_en: Diljit Dosanjh’s recent Aura World Tour has shattered his own North American record, grossing $32 million across 15 shows and drawing 225,000 fans. The milestone eclipses the $27 million, 215,000‑fan haul from his 2024 Dil‑Luminati run, underscoring a rapid acceleration in the global appetite for Punjabi and South‑Asian music. Live Nation’s data reveal a historic presale: 130,000 tickets sold in two days, the highest ever for a South‑Asian act in North America. The tour’s success is not merely a commercial triumph; it signals a broader cultural shift where non‑English‑speaking artists command mainstream venues like Madison Square Garden and Wembley Stadium. For industry insiders, the numbers illustrate a lucrative niche market, while aspiring artists see a viable pathway to global stages. The narrative invites a deeper examination of how strategic partnerships, streaming growth, and cross‑genre collaborations can amplify reach and redefine market expectations.
summary_zh: Diljit Dosanjh 以 3,200 万美元的 Aura 巡演打破自己创下的北美最大印度裔派克艺术家纪录，15 场演出吸引 225,000 名观众，收入 3,200 万美元。该成就超过 2024 年 Dil‑Luminati 巡演的 2,700 万美元、215,000 名观众纪录，凸显全球对 Punjabi 与南亚音乐的热情。Live Nation 报告显示，预售两天内售出 13 万张门票，为南亚艺术家创下北美最高纪录。此番成功不仅是商业胜利，更标志着非英语艺术家登上 Madison Square Garden、Wembley Stadium 等主流舞台的时代来临。对行业而言，数据揭示了一个盈利丰厚的细分市场；对新晋艺术家而言，则展示了通往全球舞台的可行路径。此故事促使人们进一步探讨战略合作、流媒体增长与跨界合作如何扩大影响力并重新定义市场预期。
best_quote_en: Live Nation says the run delivered its largest North American presale for a South Asian artist, selling more than 130,000 tickets in its first two days.
best_quote_zh: Live Nation表示，这场巡演在北美预售中创下了南亚艺术家的最高纪录，前两天就售出了超过13万张门票。

title: How to Do Philosophy
title_zh: 如何做哲学
summary_en: The essay is a candid, meta‑philosophical critique that traces the author’s personal journey from high‑school shock value to a sober appraisal of the discipline’s historic failures and potential. It argues that philosophy’s core problem is the lack of a core body of knowledge and the overreliance on imprecise language, which leads to endless debate and little actionable insight. The author proposes a pragmatic re‑orientation: focus on the most general truths that are also useful, and measure philosophical work by its impact on readers’ actions. This reframing echoes Aristotle’s original ambition but flips the motive from curiosity‑driven to utility‑driven, offering a way to escape the “singularity” of obscure texts that attract only the intellectually ambitious. The essay is simultaneously critical and hopeful, suggesting that philosophy can be revitalized by treating it as a toolkit for generalizable, practical wisdom rather than an abstract, untestable pursuit. It invites scholars, students, and practitioners to rethink the discipline’s purpose, methodology, and criteria for success.
summary_zh: 作者以自述的方式，剖析哲学的历史缺陷——缺乏核心知识、语言模糊导致的无意义争辩，并提出以“通用且有用”为导向的实用哲学新框架，呼吁学界重塑评判标准。
best_quote_en: "The test of utility I propose is whether we cause people who read what we've written to do anything differently afterward."
best_quote_zh: “我提出的有用性测试是，看我们写的东西是否能让读者之后有所行动。”

title: The Supreme Court Enables Trump’s Cruel Immigration Agenda
title_zh: 最高法院助推特朗普残酷的移民议程
summary_en: By dissecting two recent Supreme Court rulings, the article exposes how a conservative majority has reshaped U.S. asylum law to favor executive enforcement over individual rights. The author frames the decisions as a direct extension of Trump’s hard‑border agenda, citing the historic St. Louis tragedy to underscore the moral stakes. The analysis critiques the Court’s literal reading of “arrival” to justify pre‑border detention, and highlights the erosion of judicial oversight in Temporary Protected Status revocations. While acknowledging rare bipartisan checks on executive power, the article argues that the Court’s deference to presidential authority in immigration matters signals a dangerous precedent. The author calls for systemic reform—streamlining asylum courts and restoring meaningful checks on TPS—to prevent future abuses. The article blends legal scholarship with political commentary, offering readers a data‑driven case study that challenges readers to rethink the balance between border security and humanitarian duty.
summary_zh: 文章通过剖析两项最高法院判决，揭示保守派多数如何将美国庇护法转向行政执法，削弱个人权利。作者引用历史悲剧，批评法院对“抵达”的字面解读，导致边境预先拘留。对临时保护身份的撤销缺乏司法监督，凸显行政权力膨胀。文章呼吁改革，重建审查机制，防止未来滥用，呈现一份数据驱动的案例研究，促使读者重新思考边境安全与人道义务的平衡。
best_quote_en: The majority’s interpretation permits the Government to do that even if the refugees complied with all applicable laws and regulations, even if the port had ample capacity to inspect them, and even if turning them back would result in the very persecution from which they narrowly escaped.
best_quote_zh: 若M.S. St. Louis的难民今日走到我们南部边境的入境口岸，最高法院多数意见将允许移民官员通过物理阻止他们踏上美国土地，甚至拒绝考虑他们的庇护申请。

title: Book Freak: The skeptic’s guide to meditation that actually works
title_zh: Book Freak：怀疑者的有效冥想指南
summary_en: The article distills David Harris’s book *10% Happier* into a pragmatic playbook for skeptical readers, reframing meditation as a tool for emotional regulation rather than a mystical practice. Harris argues that we cannot stop intrusive thoughts, but we can change our relationship to them—observe, name, and respond. The piece highlights four core principles: the irreversibility of thoughts, the malevolent nature of the inner critic, the power of self‑compassion, and a quick “Is this useful?” filter to halt unproductive rumination. By pairing theory with concrete 5‑minute exercises—breath focus, utility checks, self‑compassion reframes, and active listening—the article offers a low‑friction entry point for anyone wary of traditional mindfulness. It blends scientific anecdotes with everyday language, making it accessible yet grounded. The tone invites curiosity, encouraging readers to experiment and observe outcomes, thereby turning meditation from a passive belief into an active, measurable habit. This synthesis is valuable for busy professionals, students, and anyone seeking a realistic, evidence‑based approach to mental resilience.
summary_zh: 这篇文章把《10% Happier》拆解成懒散读者可操作的实用指南，强调我们不能阻止想法，却能改变对它们的反应。核心原则包括：思维不可控但可观测、内在批评者并非朋友、同情胜过自责，以及“这有用吗？”的快速筛查。配合5分钟呼吸、效用测试、自我同情、全神贯注等练习，作者把冥想从抽象概念变为可测量的习惯。语言亲切、数据支撑，适合忙碌的职场人、学生或任何想用科学方法提升情绪弹性的人。
best_quote_en: "There’s no point in being unhappy about things you can’t change, and no point being unhappy about things you can."
best_quote_zh: “对无法改变的事不该不开心，对能改变的事也不该不开心。”

title: Sony Music Publishing wins Publisher of the Year at 2026 ASCAP Rhythm & Soul Awards
title_zh: 索尼音乐出版部在2026年ASCAP节奏与灵魂奖中荣获年度出版商奖
summary_en: Sony Music Publishing’s triumph as Publisher of the Year at the 2026 ASCAP Rhythm & Soul Awards signals a pivotal moment for the company’s strategic positioning within the contemporary music ecosystem. The accolade, grounded in Luminate’s radio and streaming data, underscores SMP’s capacity to nurture songwriting talent that consistently dominates key R&B, hip‑hop, and gospel charts. The ceremony highlighted a roster of high‑profile winners—Mustard, Leon Thomas, and the Vanguard Award recipient—illustrating the symbiotic relationship between individual artistry and corporate stewardship. From a business‑model perspective, the award amplifies SMP’s brand equity, reinforcing its value proposition to artists and partners alike. Moreover, the recognition serves as a case study in leveraging data‑driven insights to guide publishing decisions, a practice that could inform broader industry strategies for talent acquisition and catalog curation. In sum, the honor not only celebrates past achievements but also charts a forward‑looking trajectory for SMP’s influence on music creation and distribution.
summary_zh: 索尼音乐出版部获2026年ASCAP节奏与灵魂奖年度出版商奖，凸显其在R&B、嘻哈与福音音乐领域的影响力与数据驱动的战略价值，为行业提供了关于人才培养与版权管理的案例研究。
best_quote_en: This achievement reflects the extraordinary impact of SMP’s songwriters, whose work continues to inspire audiences around the world.
best_quote_zh: 这项成就反映了SMP作曲家的非凡影响力，他们的作品持续激励全球观众。

title: The one change that worked: I saw a woman lift 100kg and decided: ‘I want to do that!’
title_zh: 一次改变的力量：我看到一位女性举起100公斤，我决定：‘我也想做到！’
summary_en: Laura Evans’s narrative is a compelling study in the psychology of motivation and the transformative power of measurable progress. By framing strength training around a concrete, audacious goal—deadlifting 100 kg—she turns abstract health advice into a tangible, personal mission. The story highlights how incremental, data‑driven benchmarks can rewire a person’s self‑efficacy, especially for those who have historically felt excluded from athletic spaces. Evans’s journey from a reluctant exerciser to a confident lifter underscores the intersection of physical capability and emotional resilience, illustrating that empowerment can emerge from disciplined, goal‑oriented practice rather than fleeting trends. Her account invites readers to question societal norms about femininity and fitness, offering a nuanced critique of “body‑image” culture while celebrating the tangible benefits of strength training for everyday life. In doing so, the article serves as both inspiration and a practical guide, encouraging others to adopt a similar evidence‑based, goal‑centric approach to personal development.
summary_zh: 劳拉·埃文斯的故事展示了目标设定与可量化进步如何重塑自我效能，尤其是对传统上被排斥的女性群体。她将举重目标定为100 kg，既挑战自我，也为日常生活带来实用力量。
best_quote_en: I could pick up my children without wincing.
best_quote_zh: 我可以毫不疼痛地抬起孩子。

title: News from the Front
title_zh: 前线新闻
summary_en: Y Combinator’s investment data reveals that the prestige of a college is a weak predictor of startup success. The author argues that a founder’s effort, market fit, and personal initiative matter far more than the institution they attended. By comparing thousands of applicants, the analysis shows that individual variation dwarfs school variation, rendering elite‑college status largely irrelevant. The piece critiques corporate hiring practices that overvalue prestigious credentials and the superficial authority of university rankings. It urges a shift from grade‑centric, prestige‑driven goals toward genuine learning, doing, and self‑made achievement, suggesting that the real path to success lies in what you create, not where you studied.
summary_zh: 文章以 Y Combinator 的投资经验为例，揭示了大学名校与创业成功之间的弱关联。作者指出，创业的成败取决于创始人的努力与市场需求，而非学校背景。通过大量数据对比，作者证明个体差异远大于院校差异，强调自我学习和实践的重要性。文章批判了企业对名校的盲目偏好和大学排名的表面权威，提醒读者关注真正能驱动价值的因素。
best_quote_en: The variation between schools is so much smaller than the variation between individuals that it's negligible by comparison.
best_quote_zh: 学校之间的差异远小于个人之间的差异，以至于可以忽略不计。

title: A partner who plays music
title_zh: 一位热爱音乐的伴侣
summary_en: KatjaGrace’s rambling diary entry offers a surprisingly rich meditation on the intersection of intimacy, creativity, and the social rituals that surround sharing art. She wrestles with the paradox of being a “curmudgeonly appreciation‑prude” who feels both compelled to listen and terrified of over‑engagement. The narrative oscillates between the mundane (listening to a friend’s song on repeat) and the transcendent (the moment “Au Fond du Temple Saint” pulls her out of hyperventilation). The author’s candid description of emotional paralysis—“I sat there. I couldn’t just listen to it again. I couldn’t just do something else”—captures the awkward tension that can arise when a romantic interest is also a creator. Her reflection on whether love for the music is a proxy for a crush, or a genuine aesthetic appreciation, invites readers to question the boundaries between art and attraction. The piece is less a how‑to guide than a case study in emotional navigation, offering a raw, human‑centered lens on how we negotiate desire, authenticity, and the music that binds us.
summary_zh: 作者在自我反思中探讨音乐与亲密关系的交汇，既有日常聆听的平凡，也有“Au Fond du Temple Saint”让人喘息的超凡。她坦言情绪僵硬——“我坐在那里，无法再听，也无法做别的事”，揭示了当伴侣也是创作者时的尴尬与冲突。文章不只是指南，而是一份关于情感导航的案例研究，提醒我们在爱与艺术之间划清界限，保持真实与自我。
best_quote_en: I sat there. I couldn’t just listen to it again. I couldn’t just do something else.
best_quote_zh: 我坐在那里，无法再听，也无法做别的事。

title: OnlyFans Creators Bare All
title_zh: OnlyFans创作者全裸
summary_en: The piece unspools a kaleidoscopic portrait of the OnlyFans ecosystem, framing it not merely as a platform for erotic content but as a microcosm of contemporary labor, identity, and digital economy. It juxtaposes pioneering cam‑girls of the early 2000s with a 2026 cohort of creators who blend sex work with entrepreneurship, activism, and even philanthropy. The narrative interrogates the myth of the "lottery ticket"—a myth debunked by a 2025 survey that finds the average payout around five thousand dollars a month—while foregrounding the platform’s role in normalizing sex work and challenging stigma. The article also probes the platform’s cultural impact: from celebrity endorsements to the emergence of niche sub‑cultures, from legal controversies to the economic empowerment of marginalized creators. It invites readers to rethink the intersection of intimacy, commerce, and agency, urging a nuanced conversation about how digital platforms reshape labor, identity, and societal norms in a post‑pandemic world.
summary_zh: 文章以OnlyFans为镜，探讨数字平台如何重塑劳动、身份与社会规范。它揭示了从早期摄像女郎到2026年多元化创作者的演变，挑战“中彩票”式的成功神话，并指出平台在性工作去污名化中的作用。通过案例、调查与文化现象，作者呼吁读者重新审视亲密、商业与自主的交织，推动关于数字经济与社会变迁的深度对话。
best_quote_en: "Content creation is neither the winning lottery ticket portrayed by the tabloids nor the labor trafficking scam portrayed by antiporn groups," the 2025 survey concluded.
best_quote_zh: "内容创作既不是媒体所描绘的中奖彩票，也不是反色情团体所描述的劳工贩运骗局。"

title: Solo Travel Cities/Foreign Taxes/Canada vs. Nomads
title_zh: 独自旅行城市/外国税务/加拿大与数字游牧者
summary_en: This concise newsletter slices the nomad experience into four sharp insights. It starts by spotlighting the most popular solo‑travel cities—Toronto, Kuala Lumpur, Singapore, São Paulo, and even a tiny Salvadorian town—revealing how free walking tours can serve as social hubs for lone wanderers. The second bite demystifies a common expatriate headache: local income tax liabilities. It catalogs jurisdictions where foreign‑earned income is tax‑neutral, highlighting Latin America’s generosity and the Philippines’ favorable stance for remote workers. The third section warns of Canada’s tightened rules, demanding proof that digital nomads earn entirely outside Canada, a regulatory hurdle that could derail spontaneous work‑travel plans. Finally, the piece pivots to energy policy, noting that U.S. solar installations have eclipsed coal, a trend amplified by Trump‑winning states’ capacity additions. Together, these snippets paint a picture of a world where travel, taxation, immigration, and sustainability intersect, offering travelers actionable data, legal foresight, and a glimpse of shifting global priorities.
summary_zh: 本周简讯以四条要点勾勒数字游牧者的全景：首推热门独行城市，展示免费徒步如何成为社交平台；解析哪些国家对境外收入免税，帮助远程工作者规避税务陷阱；警示加拿大新规要求证明全部收入来自境外，提醒行前准备；并指出美国太阳能已超越煤炭，映射能源转型趋势。内容兼具实用与前瞻，激发读者对旅行、税务、移民与可持续发展的深度思考。
best_quote_en: digital nomads now “must provide sufficient documentation to demonstrate that their income is earned entirely outside Canada and that they will be working remotely for a foreign employer or, if self‑employed, that they will be providing services exclusively to clients outside Canada.”
best_quote_zh: 数字游牧者现在“必须提供足够的文件，证明他们的收入完全来自加拿大境外，并且他们将为外国雇主远程工作，或者如果是自雇，则必须仅为加拿大境外的客户提供服务。”

title: How Not to Die
title_zh: 如何不死亡
summary_en: Y Combinator’s founder delivers a candid talk on startup survival, framing failure as the inevitable fate for half the companies he funds. He argues that the real success metric is simply not dying, and that staying in regular contact, maintaining momentum, and avoiding distractions are the most reliable predictors of longevity. The speech blends hard data—such as the 100 % accuracy of silence as a death signal—with psychological insights about fear of failure, public humiliation, and the power of a committed core user base. He warns against the common “we’ll keep working” mindset that masks resignation, and urges founders to treat their venture as a full‑time, high‑stakes endeavor. The message is both a sobering reminder of startup volatility and a pragmatic playbook: keep iterating, stay engaged, and never give up. It invites founders to view survival as the first step toward wealth, reframing the startup journey as a battle against demoralization rather than a lottery.
summary_zh: YC创始人以坦诚的语调阐述创业生存之道：失败是公司的一半命运，真正的成功是活下来。通过数据和心理洞察，他指出保持定期沟通、持续进展、避免分心是预防死亡的关键。警示“我们会继续努力”往往掩盖放弃，强调将创业视为全职高风险任务。信息既是对创业波动的严肃提醒，也是实用手册：持续迭代、保持投入、永不放弃，重塑生存为战胜沮丧的过程，最终走向财富。
best_quote_en: If you can just avoid dying, you get rich.
best_quote_zh: 只要避免失败，你就能致富。

title: Works in Progress / 100 greatest bird names / Cat water fountain
title_zh: Works in Progress / 100 greatest bird names / Cat water fountain
summary_en: This eclectic newsletter blends a referral‑based incentive scheme with a curated roundup of niche products and thought‑provoking content. The author rewards readers for sharing the free newsletter—offering exclusive PDFs, AMA invites, and personalized doodles—thereby turning passive consumption into a community‑building activity. The piece spotlights "Works in Progress," a Stripe‑backed print magazine that champions underrated ideas across tech, science, and culture, positioning itself as a tangible counter‑point to the digital‑only Substack landscape. The author also shares a whimsical list of the 100 greatest bird names, a stainless‑steel cat water fountain review, and a nostalgic look at early web folk art, all underscored by a personal touch that invites readers to appreciate both tangible and intangible value. The content’s core insight is the power of tangible, well‑designed media to foster deeper engagement, while the referral program demonstrates how value‑based incentives can grow an audience organically. Overall, the newsletter exemplifies a hybrid model of content curation, community building, and product advocacy that resonates with readers seeking both novelty and actionable recommendations.
summary_zh: 这份多元化的简报将推荐奖励与精选产品、前沿想法相结合。作者通过提供独家PDF、AMA邀请和手绘感谢卡，鼓励读者分享免费简报，形成社区成长。重点介绍Stripe支持的印刷杂志《Works in Progress》，强调纸质媒介的独特价值；同时分享百鸟名称、猫用水喷泉、早期网页民俗艺术等趣味内容，体现了对实物与数字体验的双重关注。
best_quote_en: Works in Progress is the only magazine I get delivered on paper; I enjoy reading its designed pages, and getting the extra bits you don’t get online.
best_quote_zh: 《Works in Progress》是我唯一收到纸质版的杂志；我喜欢阅读它精心设计的页面，并获得线上没有的额外内容。

title: HYBE’s Big Hit cracks down on ‘egregious and unlawful conduct’ targeting CORTIS, as fans attach GPS trackers to artists’ vehicles
title_zh: HYBE旗下BIGHIT音乐严厉打击针对CORTIS的‘严重且违法行为’，粉丝在艺人车辆上安装GPS追踪器
summary_en: HYBE’s BIGHIT MUSIC has taken a hard‑line stance against a wave of privacy violations targeting its rookie boy group, CORTIS. The label filed criminal complaints over online abuse, illegal sale of flight data, and the mounting trend of fans affixing GPS trackers to the artists’ vehicles during a Paris tour. By publicly warning fans on its Weverse platform, BIGHIT not only signals zero‑tolerance for “egregious and unlawful conduct” but also underscores the growing intersection of fandom culture and personal data protection. The company’s action—reporting to police, issuing verbal warnings, and deleting unauthorized content—highlights a proactive, multi‑channel response that blends legal recourse with community education. For industry observers, the case illustrates how K‑pop conglomerates are redefining artist safety protocols in an era of hyper‑connected fandoms. It also raises questions about the balance between fan engagement and privacy, prompting a broader dialogue on ethical boundaries in pop culture. Ultimately, HYBE’s measures set a precedent that may compel other labels to adopt stricter safeguards, reshaping the business model of fan‑artist interactions.
summary_zh: HYBE旗下BIGHIT音乐对针对CORTIS的隐私侵犯采取零容忍态度，公开投诉网络辱骂、非法售卖航班信息，并警告粉丝在巴黎巡演期间给艺人车辆装置GPS追踪器。此举不仅凸显了粉丝文化与个人数据保护的交叉点，也展示了企业通过法律、警告与内容删除三管齐下的主动防御模式。对业内而言，此案例揭示了K‑pop巨头正重新定义艺人安全协议，促使标签在高度互联的粉丝生态中更严谨地设定边界。更重要的是，它引发了关于粉丝参与与隐私权平衡的讨论，推动了流行文化伦理边界的再思考。HYBE的做法或将成为行业新标准，重塑粉丝与艺人互动的商业模式。
best_quote_en: Both the sale and purchase of artists’ flight information constitute violation of the Personal Information Protection Act, the Information and Communications Network Act, and other applicable laws.
best_quote_zh: 非法创建和传播针对艺人的有害内容尤其严重，尤其是许多成员仍是未成年人。
